indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for a wide range of movement and stretching.

indicators.name: Soft furniture
indicators.rationale: The soft furniture provides comfort during stretching and yoga poses.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can help set a calming atmosphere for yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for yoga and stretching due to its open layout, comfortable furniture, and natural lighting.
